opinion.h2: SOUTHERN PACIFIC COMPANY, a corporation, petitioner, v. Leila Mae WALTON, Administratrix, etc.* No. 548.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Arthur B. Dunne, of San Francisco, Cal., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the District Court of Appeals, State of California, denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 665, 56 S. Ct. 380.[ Southern Pac Co v. Walton (1935) ]
